evals.prompt: I need a plan for adding user profile pages to our SaaS app. Users should be able to view and edit their display name, bio, avatar photo, and notification preferences. We already have user authentication and a settings API endpoint. Need this broken into tasks with acceptance criteria, and I need to hand it off to a developer. Use the plan-output-template format please.
evals.expected_output: A complete feature plan following the Feature Plan template with objective, tasks (with dependencies, complexity estimates, acceptance criteria), risks, and open questions.
expectations: Plan uses the Feature Plan template structure
Plan has a date-prefixed filename (YYYY-MM-DD-)
Plan has a clear Objective section describing WHAT and WHY
Plan has at least 3 tasks with dependencies mapped
Every task has a complexity estimate (small/medium/large)
Every task has verifiable acceptance criteria
Plan has a Risks & Blockers section
Plan has an Open Questions section
No task uses 'works correctly' or 'done properly' as acceptance criteria
No circular dependencies between tasks

evals.prompt: Critical bug! Our payment processing system is double-charging customers when they click the 'Place Order' button multiple times. We need a plan to fix this with idempotency keys. We use Stripe for payments and have an existing order service. Need tasks broken down with who does what, and a plan I can hand to our backend dev. Use the plan-output-template format.
evals.expected_output: A complete bugfix plan following the Bugfix Plan template with bug description, root cause, reproduction steps, and tasks for fix and regression testing.
expectations: Plan uses the Bugfix Plan template structure
Plan has a Bug Description section
Plan includes reproduction steps for the bug
Plan has a Root Cause section
Plan includes a task for adding regression tests
Every task has verifiable acceptance criteria
Every task has a complexity estimate
Dependencies between tasks are clearly mapped
Plan has a Risks section
Plan has an Open Questions section

evals.prompt: Our authentication module has grown into a 3000-line monster that's impossible to maintain. We need to refactor it into smaller, focused modules: auth-core (JWT handling, password hashing), auth-middleware (Express middleware), and auth-providers (OAuth integrations). External behavior must NOT change. We have good test coverage already. Produce a refactoring plan following the plan-output-template that I can hand off to a senior dev.
evals.expected_output: A complete refactor plan following the Refactor Plan template with objective, behavior preservation requirements, and tasks for each module extraction.
expectations: Plan uses the Refactor Plan template structure
Plan has an Objective section explaining the refactoring goal
Plan has a Behavior Preservation section describing what must not change
Plan has at least 3 tasks for extracting modules
Plan includes a task for updating tests
Every task has verifiable acceptance criteria
Every task has a complexity estimate
Dependencies are clearly mapped between tasks
Plan has a Risks section covering regression risks
Plan has an Open Questions section

evals.prompt: We need to integrate Stripe payment processing into our e-commerce platform. Requirements: one-time payments, subscription support, webhook handling for payment events, and a customer portal for managing billing. We already have a user system and order management. I need a plan following the plan-output-template format that accounts for API contracts, error handling, and monitoring. This will be handed to a full-stack team.
evals.expected_output: A complete integration plan following the Integration Plan template with API contract details, tasks for core integration, error handling, and monitoring.
expectations: Plan uses the Integration Plan template structure
Plan has an Integration Contract section (API version, auth, etc.)
Plan has a task for error handling and fallbacks
Plan has a task for monitoring and alerting
Every task has verifiable acceptance criteria
Every task has a complexity estimate
Dependencies between tasks are mapped
Plan has a Risks section covering external API risks
Plan has an Open Questions section
Risks include rate limits or API changes

evals.prompt: Our team needs to plan a migration from a monolithic Rails app to microservices. This is a big effort so it needs multiple phases: Phase 1 - Extract the auth service (2 weeks), Phase 2 - Extract the billing service (3 weeks), Phase 3 - Extract the notification service (2 weeks), Phase 4 - Decompose the monolith API gateway (3 weeks). Each phase must be independently deliverable. I need a plan using the plan-output-template that accounts for cross-cutting concerns like shared database dependencies, API versioning, and deployment coordination.
evals.expected_output: A complete multi-phase plan following the Multi-Phase Plan template with phases, tasks per phase, cross-phase risks, and open questions.
expectations: Plan uses the Multi-Phase Plan template structure
Plan has at least 4 phases
Each phase has its own tasks section
Each phase has target dates or durations
Each phase has its own risks section
Plan has a Cross-Phase Risks section
Every task has verifiable acceptance criteria
Every task has a complexity estimate
Dependencies are mapped within each phase
Plan has an Open Questions section
